Alpha Insights

Market regime transitioned from Equilibrium to Expansion at 14:45. System correctly identified the volatility expansion, increasing size on momentum setups.

Correlation with Treasury yields was the primary driver for vetoed positions. Claude Intelligence successfully suppressed 4 potential losing trades in the NQ sector during the yield spike.

"Recommendation: Tighten trailing stops on mean-reversion setups if volume profile remains thin in the 4,450 zone."
